mapper.update: UPDATE `car`.`email_tokens` SET `code` = #{token.code}, `salt` = #{token.salt}, `retry_count` = IF(`is_used` = TRUE, 0, `retry_count` + 1), `expires_at` = #{token.expiresAt}, `created_at` = NOW(), `is_verified` = FALSE, `is_used` = FALSE WHERE `email` = #{token.email} LIMIT 1
mapper.select: SELECT `email`, `password`, `name`, `phone`, `car_model` AS `carModel`, `car_number` AS `carNumber`, `fuel_type` AS `fuelType`, `mileage`, `annual_mileage` AS `annualMileage`, `driving_env` AS `drivingEnv`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `social_type_code` AS `socialTypeCode`, `social_id` AS `socialId` FROM `car`.`users` WHERE `email` = #{email}

SELECT `email`, `password`, `name`, `phone`, `car_model` AS `carModel`, `car_number` AS `carNumber`, `fuel_type` AS `fuelType`, `mileage`, `annual_mileage` AS `annualMileage`, `driving_env` AS `drivingEnv`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `social_type_code` AS `socialTypeCode`, `social_id` AS `socialId` FROM `car`.`users` WHERE `social_type_code` = #{socialTypeCode} AND `social_id` = #{socialId}

SELECT `email`, `code`, `salt`, `retry_count` AS `retryCount`, `is_verified` AS `isVerified`, `is_used` AS `isUsed`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `expires_at` AS `expiresAt` FROM `car`.`email_tokens` WHERE `email` = #{email} ORDER BY `created_at` DESC LIMIT 1
